zh.Shenton, Hinckley and Bosworth, Leiceste: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾欣克利
zh.Bosworth Field, Market Bosworth, Leicest: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Shenton於大約1505年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾欣克利時，他的父親Richard Shenton26歲，母親Sarah Chesters25歲。他於1529年與Alice Wintley在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾欣克利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1557年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Shenton于大约1505年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾欣克利时，他的父亲Richard Shenton26岁，母亲Sarah Chesters25岁。他于1529年与Alice Wintley在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾欣克利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1557年在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Shenton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Sheinton (Shropshire), Shenton (Leicestershire), or Shavington (Cheshire), recorded as Shenton in 1514. The Shropshire placename probably derives from Old English scēne ‘bright, beautiful’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, or perhaps from an Old English personal name Scēna + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Leicestershire place takes its name from the river Sence, itself from Old English scenc ‘drink, draught’, + Old English tūn, while the Cheshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Scēafa + Old English connective -ing- + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Shenton was born about 1505, in Hinckley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Shenton, was 26 and his mother, Sarah Chesters, was 25. He married Alice Wintley in 1529, in Hinckley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1557, in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

Il a épousé Alice Wintley en 1529, à Hinckley, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1557, à Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Shenton(이)가 대략 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 인클리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Shenton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Chesters(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1529년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 인클리에서 Alice Wintley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1557년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.
